description: A recent penetration test revealed information disclosure vulnerabilities on our Socioboard web server. Configure Apache2 and PHP 7.4 to secure the server by hiding Apache version and OS details from HTTP headers, removing the PHP version header, and disabling directory browsing so that accessing directories without an index file (such as /test_indexes/) results in a 403 Forbidden error. Ensure all configuration changes are applied to the service. You have root access via sudo if needed. A terminal is available on the desktop.
